title: Immersive Vehicles Vanity [MTS/IV]
description:
Content pack for Immersive Vehicles (formerly known as Minecraft Transport Simulator)
Decorations, parts and vehicles for your world!
body:
This mod requires a coremod known as Immersive Vehicles, and will not load unless you install it.

Immersive Vehicles Vanity (or IVV if you prefer) is an addon pack for Immersive Vehicles with content featuring items of comedic value, experimental features that push the boundaries of Immersive Vehicles and varied decorative pieces for your world.

This mod includes (but is not limited to):

  • Robot statues
  • Unique food items
  • Knight Rider-inspired car
  • Lots of unique guns
  • Powerful yet reliable motors

And more!

More information can be found or requested in the Official IVLabs Discord Server

 

As of June 28th 2024 this mod is distributed under the GNU General Public License v3.0
